testcase.name: activeUser_foundByEmail

exists audit_logs cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists consultations cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists medecins cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists medical_records cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists permissions cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists prescription_consultations cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists prescription_medicaments cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists prescriptions cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists refresh_tokens cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists reimbursements cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists role_permissions cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists roles cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists user_roles cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table assures ( date_affiliation date, est_actif boolean, id uuid not null, medecin_traitant_id uuid, num_securite_sociale varchar(20) not null unique, emploi varchar(150), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table assureurs ( id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table audit_logs ( timestamp timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid, action varchar(20) not null check (action in ('CREATE','UPDATE','DELETE')), ip_address varchar(45), entity_id varchar(50) not null, entity_type varchar(100) not null, new_value TEXT, old_value TEXT, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table consultations ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, date_consultation timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), assure_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, medecin_id uuid not null, type_consultation varchar(20) not null check (type_consultation in ('GENERALISTE','SPECIALISTE')), diagnostique TEXT, motif TEXT, notes TEXT, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table medecins ( est_assure boolean, id uuid not null, numero_rpps varchar(20) not null unique, specialite varchar(20) not null check (specialite in ('GENERALISTE','SPECIALISTE')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table medical_records ( date date not null, est_remboursee boolean, montant_rembourse numeric(12,2), created_at timestamp(6) not null, date_remboursement timestamp(6), deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), assure_id uuid not null, consultation_id uuid not null unique, id uuid not null, medecin_id uuid not null, nom_maladie varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table permissions ( id uuid not null, permission_name varchar(100) not null unique, description varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table prescription_consultations ( id uuid not null, medecin_specialiste_id uuid, priorite varchar(20), code_reference varchar(50), motif TEXT, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table prescription_medicaments ( id uuid not null, duree varchar(100), medicament varchar(200) not null, posologie varchar(500), notes TEXT, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table prescriptions ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), consultation_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, prescription_type varchar(31) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table refresh_tokens ( revoked boolean not null, expiry_date timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, token varchar(500) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table reimbursements ( montant_rembourse numeric(12,2) not null, montant_total numeric(12,2) not null, taux_remboursement integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, date_remboursement timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, medical_record_id uuid not null unique, mode_paiement varchar(20) check (mode_paiement in ('VIREMENT','CASH')), num_remboursement varchar(20) not null unique, status varchar(20) not null check (status in ('PENDING','APPROVED','PAID','REJECTED')), justificatif_path varchar(500), notes TEXT, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table role_permissions ( permission_id uuid not null, role_id uuid not null, primary key (permission_id, role_id) ) Hibernate: create table roles ( id uuid not null, role_name varchar(30) not null unique check (role_name in ('ADMIN','MEDECIN','ASSUREUR','PATIENT')), description varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table user_roles ( role_id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, primary key (role_id, user_id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( date_naissance date, sexe char(1) check (sexe in ('M','F')), created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, telephone varchar(30), user_type varchar(31) not null, nom varchar(100) not null, prenom varchar(100) not null, lieu_naissance varchar(150), adresse varchar(500), email varchar(255) not null unique, password_hash varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists assures add constraint FKgr15eb4x5ppmaotof6g54cdrp foreign key (medecin_traitant_id) references medecins Hibernate: alter table if exists assures add constraint FKp2uiq2ipqit1bydagfm9s9iho foreign key (id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists assureurs add constraint FKqvhkhldtrrn5q5823xc3srh17 foreign key (id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists audit_logs add constraint FKjs4iimve3y0xssbtve5ysyef0 foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists consultations add constraint FKp888apatl2x1jp7h82rwgo3cn foreign key (assure_id) references assures Hibernate: alter table if exists consultations add constraint FKm13paahvm6yuirypqbthcnces foreign key (medecin_id) references medecins Hibernate: alter table if exists medecins add constraint FKds5gkq7o1pyha42s8bn547qyl foreign key (id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists medical_records add constraint FKg660tlbw0i88hkx2v1wgwv8xs foreign key (assure_id) references assures Hibernate: alter table if exists medical_records add constraint FKg2pe9dcq7etl5rj5nv5avd1ts foreign key (consultation_id) references consultations Hibernate: alter table if exists medical_records add constraint FK6sydfjqe22bu4l6doeoq116qg foreign key (medecin_id) references medecins Hibernate: alter table if exists prescription_consultations add constraint FKfrscfycs2aujtatvjxnunw6bv foreign key (medecin_specialiste_id) references medecins Hibernate: alter table if exists prescription_consultations add constraint FKattr8yv3om51na159xe4fwnkk foreign key (id) references prescriptions Hibernate: alter table if exists prescription_medicaments add constraint FK9l3gvgbh8lfd9aatxwe9i5i2r foreign key (id) references prescriptions Hibernate: alter table if exists prescriptions add constraint FKj6varr98psv2onkoxks6jin14 foreign key (consultation_id) references consultations Hibernate: alter table if exists refresh_tokens add constraint FK1lih5y2npsf8u5o3vhdb9y0os foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists reimbursements add constraint FK3ev6rr3k59aaag9faen4c5lsl foreign key (medical_record_id) references medical_records Hibernate: alter table if exists role_permissions add constraint FKegdk29eiy7mdtefy5c7eirr6e foreign key (permission_id) references permissions Hibernate: alter table if exists role_permissions add constraint FKn5fotdgk8d1xvo8nav9uv3muc foreign key (role_id) references roles Hibernate: alter table if exists user_roles add constraint FKh8ciramu9cc9q3qcqiv4ue8a6 foreign key (role_id) references roles Hibernate: alter table if exists user_roles add constraint FKhfh9dx7w3ubf1co1vdev94g3f foreign key (user_id) references testcase.name: softDeletedUser_excludedFromFindById
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into roles (description, role_name, id) values (?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into users (adresse, created_at, date_naissance, deleted_at, email, lieu_naissance, nom, password_hash, prenom, sexe, telephone, updated_at, user_type, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'ASSUREUR', ?) Hibernate: insert into assureurs (id) values (?) Hibernate: update users set adresse=?, date_naissance=?, deleted_at=?, email=?, lieu_naissance=?, nom=?, password_hash=?, prenom=?, sexe=?, telephone=?, updated_at=? where id=? Hibernate: insert into user_roles (user_id, role_id) values (?, ?) Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.user_type, u1_0.adresse, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.date_naissance, u1_0.deleted_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.lieu_naissance, u1_0.nom, u1_0.password_hash, u1_0.prenom, r1_0.user_id, r1_1.id, r1_1.description, r1_1.role_name, u1_0.sexe, u1_0.telephone, u1_0.updated_at, u1_0.user_type, u1_1.date_affiliation, u1_1.emploi, u1_1.est_actif, u1_1.medecin_traitant_id, u1_1.num_securite_sociale, u1_2.est_assure, u1_2.numero_rpps, u1_2.specialite, u1_1.id, u1_2.id from users u1_0 left join assures u1_1 on u1_0.id=u1_1.id left join medecins u1_2 on u1_0.id=u1_2.id left join user_roles r1_0 on u1_0.id=r1_0.user_id left join roles r1_1 on r1_1.id=r1_0.role_id where u1_0.id=? and ( u1_0.deleted_at IS NULL ) Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.user_type, u1_0.adresse, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.date_naissance, u1_0.deleted_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.lieu_naissance, u1_0.nom, u1_0.password_hash, u1_0.prenom, u1_0.sexe, u1_0.telephone, u1_0.updated_at, u1_0.user_type, u1_1.id, u1_1.date_affiliation, u1_1.emploi, u1_1.est_actif, u1_1.medecin_traitant_id, u1_1.num_securite_sociale, u1_3.id, u1_3.est_assure, u1_3.numero_rpps, u1_3.specialite from users u1_0 left join assures u1_1 on u1_0.id=u1_1.id left join assureurs u1_2 on u1_0.id=u1_2.id left join medecins u1_3 on u1_0.id=u1_3.id where ( u1_0.deleted_at IS NULL ) and u1_0.email=?
